description_long: This is a wooden bed frame with a natural, light brown wood grain finish and a prominent rectangular headboard featuring subtle horizontal and vertical line detailing. The frame is constructed with thick, solid panels on the sides and foot, providing a sturdy and robust appearance. The bed base consists of evenly spaced wooden slats supported by a central rail, designed to hold a mattress securely. The headboard is tall and flat, offering support for sitting up in bed, while the footboard is lower and plain, matching the side panels. There are no visible drawers or storage compartments integrated into the frame. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, emphasizing clean lines and functional structure.
description: A sturdy, light brown wooden bed frame with a tall headboard, slatted base, and clean, modern lines. The design is minimalistic and robust, with no visible mattress or bedding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall headboard, slatted base, and solid footboard with visible wood grain.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the frame panels and the depth of the headboard.
description_view_2: Top-down view of the headboard, displaying its flat, uninterrupted wood surface and grain pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side and showing the slatted base and headboard profile.
